title: Lightstones
description: Adds emissive stones inspired by Bionicle
body: This mod essentially adds waterproof torches called Lightstones. They can be obtained by mining Lightstone Ore, which will yield 3-5. They emit slightly more light than torches, but have collision, so they are not a replacement for torches, but are useful in desperate or aquatic situations. They also look cool! Pair them with Aqua Affinity for feasible underwater mining.
